---
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: Candara
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry: 
      - left=15mm
      - right=15mm
      - top=20mm
      - bottom=20mm
    numbersections: false
    urlcolor: "blue"
    link-citations: true
---


# ANDRÉ LUIZ BARBOSA NUNES DA CUNHA

**Tenured Assistant Professor of Civil Engineering | AI & Sustainability in Transport**\
University of São Paulo ([USP](https://www5.usp.br/en)) • São Carlos School of Engineering ([EESC](https://eesc.usp.br/en/))
Department of Transport Engineering ([STT](https://eesc.usp.br/ppgs/stt/))\ 
São Carlos, SP, Brazil


  
<alcunha@usp.br> | +55 16 98119 2339 | 
[[Google Scholar]](https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=HI0CQJMAAAAJ&hl=en) |
[[ORCID]](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0520-0621)  | 
<!--[[WoS]](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/U-4375-2019) · -->
[[LinkedIn]](https://www.linkedin.com/in/prof-alcunha/) |
[[LinkTree]](https://linktr.ee/prof_alcunha) 
  

\hrulefill

### Professional Summary

Tenured civil engineering academic with 12+ years of post-doctoral experience bridging transport infrastructure, sustainability, and AI-driven engineering. Research portfolio of ~USD 3.38 million in competitive grants and industry contracts. Co-PI on a USD 1.45M FAPESP initiative on pavement recycling and decarbonisation. Extensive teaching leadership (6 courses, curriculum redesign, inverted classroom), research supervision (60+ scholars, 3 PhDs and 12 MScs completed), and institutional governance. International research experience in Australia, Germany, Croatia, and Portugal.




## EDUCATION \hrulefill

1. **Ph.D. in Transportation Engineering** \dotfill Nov. 2013\
*University of São Paulo (USP), São Carlos School of Engineering (EESC), Brazil*
      - Thesis: "*Automatic system for vehicular traffic parameters using OpenCV*"
      - DOI: [10.11606/T.18.2013.tde-19112013-165611](https://doi.org/10.11606/T.18.2013.tde-19112013-165611)
      - Funded by CNPq (National Council for Scientific and Technological Development), Brazil.  


2. **M.Sc. in Transportation Engineering** \dotfill Oct. 2007\
*University of São Paulo (USP), São Carlos School of Engineering (EESC), Brazil*
      - Thesis: "*Evaluation of performance measurement impact on truck passenger car equivalents*"
      - DOI: [10.11606/D.18.2007.tde-27112007-094400](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2007.tde-27112007-094400)
      - Funded by CNPq, Brazil.


3. **B.S. in Civil Engineering** \dotfill Feb. 2004\
*Federal University of Mato Grosso do Sul (UFMS), Brazil*
      - *GPA*: 3.79/4.00 $\rightarrow$ (9.5/10.0), (Highest Honors)



## ACADEMIC APPOINTMENTS \hrulefill

**Tenured Assistant Professor** (equivalent to Associate Professor) \dotfill 2014 – present\
*University of São Paulo (USP), Dept. of Transport Engineering*, São Carlos, Brazil.

  - Director of the Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS) Research Group.
  - Tenure awarded 2021; promoted to Senior Faculty status (MS-3.2).
  - Elected: Department Council, Graduate Coordinating Committee (CCP-ET), Center for Educational Technology in Engineering (CETEPE), Research and Innovation Committee (CPqI), Culture & Extension Committee (CCEx)

    
**Research Scientist & Laboratory Specialist** \dotfill 2013 – 2014\
*University of São Paulo (USP), Department of Transport Engineering (STT)*, São Carlos, Brazil.

**Assistant Professor** \dotfill 2010\
*São Paulo State University (UNESP), College of Engineering of Bauru (FEB)*, Bauru, Brazil.



## INTERNATIONAL MOBILITY \hrulefill

- **University of Melbourne** (Australia) - Visiting Researcher, CAPES-Print (2020)

- **University of Zagreb** (Croatia) - Visiting Lecturer, ERASMUS+ (2018, 2022)

- **University of Minho** (Portugal) - Visiting Professor, CAPES-FCT (2017)

- **Technical University of Munich** (Germany) - Visiting Professor, FAPESP-BAYLAT (2016, 2017)


## RESEARCH AGENDA - Sustainability & Innovation \hrulefill

  - **Pavement Recycling & Decarbonization (SDG 9 & 12)**: Co-PI on FAPESP USD 1.45M initiative. Data-driven modelling and optimisation for recycled pavement materials; engineering technical protocols for net-zero infrastructure.

   - **Urban Climate Resilience & Social Equity (SDG 11 & 13)**: Assessing multimodal network vulnerability to extreme floods using graph theory. Designing fail-safe transport systems for marginalised communities.

  - **Next-Gen AI for Global Safety Standards (SDG 3.6)**: Deep learning and large multimodal models for real-time traffic anomaly detection. Scaling national concessionaire work to global operational standards.

  - **Digital Twins & International Policy (SDG 17)**: Digital twins for highway concessions integrating Edge AI and sensor fusion for smart city policies.



## RESEARCH FUNDING & GRANTS (~USD 3.38 Million Total) \hrulefill


### Competitive Research Grants (Peer-Reviewed)

- **2025–2030:** FAPESP CCD Grant — "Pavement Recycling as a Pillar of Decarbonisation." Co-PI. ~USD 1.45M
- **2023–2028:** FAPESP CEPID "IARA" — AI Recreating Environments. Research Collaborator. ~USD 1.8M
- **2023–2026:** CNPq Consolidated Groups — Traffic modelling for smart/connected cities. PI. ~USD 13,900
- **2023–2026:** CNPq Research Productivity — AI tools for urban mobility. PI. ~USD 7,200
- **2021:** Uni. Zagreb — Innovative Control Strategies for Sustainable Mobility. Co-PI. ~USD 9,500
- **2019:** CAPES-Print — Visiting Professorship, University of Melbourne. PI. ~AUD 150,000
- **2018–2022:** CNPq Universal — Image-based truck axle detection and classification. PI. ~USD 2,700
- **2018:** Uni. Zagreb — Deep learning in intelligent traffic control. Co-PI. ~USD 10,100
- **2013–2016:** CAPES/FCT — Promoting sustainable and safe urban mobility. Co-PI. ~USD 3,600


### Industry Contracts & Translational Research

- **2025:** CCR Group (RioSP) — Redesign truck escape ramp BR-116 (Via Dutra). PI. ~USD 32,700
- **2023:** CCR Group (RioSP) — Evaluate truck escape ramp BR-116 (Via Dutra). PI. ~USD 16,300
- **2019:** ARTERIS (ALS) — Site optimisation for truck escape ramps BR-376. PI. ~USD 27,200



## RESEARCH SUPERVISION & MENTORING \hrulefill
 
**Summary**
: 60+ researchers directed. 6 PhD (3 completed, 3 in progress) | 15 MSc (12 completed, 3 in progress) | 18 scientific initiation (16 completed) | 25 capstone projects completed



### Completed PhD (3)
1. [G.J.M. Oliveira]() (2024): "*[Toward a Data-driven Framework to Analyse Temporal and Spatial Distributions of Crashes](https://minerva-access.unimelb.edu.au/items/9d41c43a-a211-41ce-92fe-f081fc49e630)*"

1. [L.A. Marcomini](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=AcNWryQAAAAJ&hl=en) (2025): "*[Classification of trucks by axles using Deep Learning and a Large Multimodal Model](https://doi.org/10.11606/T.18.2025.tde-11022026-082130)*"

1. [A.B. Morelli](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=BqdPZ2gAAAAJ&hl=en) (2025): "*Analysis of Flood Vulnerability in Brazilian Urban Networks Using Graph Theory Tools.*"



### PhD in Progress

1. [E.R. Ribeiro](https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=0r-M5IcAAAAJ): "*Analysis of motorcyclist' behaviour on urban segments: Relationship between riding patterns and rider profile*"

1. [T.V. Louro](https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=ietBcOUAAAAJ): "*Examining The Impacts Of Electric Bicycles On Accessibility To Jobs And Spatial Equity*"

1. [P.H.C. Caliari](https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=hy142eUAAAAJ): "*Evaluation of causal inference and spatial effects on travel behavior*" 

### Completed MSc (12)

1. [C.E. Ribeiro]() (2024): "*[Evaluation of deep neural networks for vehicle detection in satellite images](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2024.tde-31102024-114415)*"

1. [P.Y. Matsumoto](https://lattes.cnpq.br/6933325479741942) (2022): "*[Calibration of Cellular Automata model for simulation of the traffic flow behavior in São Paulo roads](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2022.tde-18102022-103557)*" 

1. [H.S. Stefani](https://lattes.cnpq.br/2263620972100266) (2021): "*[Urban roadway traffic flow prediction from crowdsourced speed data](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2021.tde-22082022-091919)*"

1. [A.D.Bosco Jr](https://lattes.cnpq.br/7512695029586698) (2020): "*[Usability of Points of Interest and network centralities of collaborative maps for trip attraction analysis: case study of Curitiba](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2020.tde-18042022-143053)*" 

1. [A.B. Morelli](https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=BqdPZ2gAAAAJ) (2019) "*[Exploratory analysis of resilience in urban road networks](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2020.tde-13012020-153303)*"

1. [B. Kuramoto](https://lattes.cnpq.br/3302815314452867) (2019): "*[Data exploration of collaborative maps in evaluations of Brazilian urban morphologies](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2019.tde-20082019-084513)*"

1. [A.B. Felicio](https://lattes.cnpq.br/1581979506356539) (2019): "*[Evaluation of the behavior of motorcyclists through the video image processing system](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2020.tde-12052020-170835)*"

1. [N.R. Panice](https://lattes.cnpq.br/3462901770011968) (2018): "*[Truck axle detection automatic method based on images](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2018.tde-11122018-213600)*" 

1. [M.M. Thebit](https://lattes.cnpq.br/9374994847060943) (2018): "*[Reconstruction of a synthetic O/D matrix using traffic data available on the web](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2018.tde-10122018-225948)*"

1. [L.A. Marcomini](https://lattes.cnpq.br/3128200022537201) (2018): "*[Automatic identification of traffic behavior using video images](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2018.tde-01102018-102649)*" 

1. [G.J.M. Oliveira](https://lattes.cnpq.br/1828432370828925) (2018): "*[Calibration of speed-flow relationship for freeways and multilane highways](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2018.tde-10092018-150848)*" 

1. [E.R. Ribeiro](https://lattes.cnpq.br/4988917064689096) (2017): "*[Exploratory method analysis using Wavelet to detect patterns and anomalies in traffic history data](https://doi.org/10.11606/D.18.2017.tde-07112017-212156)*" 


### MSc in Progress
1. [A.V. Costa](http://lattes.cnpq.br/7862988333397510) "*Accessibility to Social Services in Belo Horizonte-MG*" 

2. [M.E.S. Michelini](http://lattes.cnpq.br/6355612958124418) "*Development of an Emission Estimation Model for Brazilian Cases*" 

3. [R.O.F.P. Oliveira](http://lattes.cnpq.br/3660336154224847) "*Urban resilience assessment through a comparative study of flood prediction methods*" 



**Alumni Placement**

Graduates placed at national regulatory agencies (ANTT, ARTESP) in Brazil, leading transport consultancies in Brazil and abroad, and the financial sector. 



## TEACHING PORTFOLIO (USP, 2014-present) \hrulefill

### Data Science & Computational Engineering

  - **Multivariate Data Analysis & Applied Statistics (Graduate):** AI techniques (neural networks, decision trees, genetic algorithms), R programming. Students publish from course datasets.
- **Computational Tools for Civil Engineering (Undergraduate):** New elective I designed. 20+ students/year. Spreadsheet programming, algorithms, AutoCAD, Civil 3D, GIS.

### Core Transport Engineering & Simulation

- **Fundamentals of Transportation Engineering (Undergraduate):** Inverted classroom, project-based learning, 50+ students. Student evaluations: 4.5/5.0.
- **Traffic Engineering & Simulation (UG/Graduate):** VISSIM, AIMSUN, SUMO, TSIS-CORSIM. Industry-ready skills.

### Logistics & Green Infrastructure

- **Logistics & Supply Chain Management:** Completely redesigned with AI logistics, GIS route planning, Green Logistics.
- **Airports & Waterways:** Large compulsory modules, 50+ students, theory and operational exercises.

### Capstone & Mentorship

- Supervised 25+ final-year engineering capstone projects and 15+ internship placements.


## PUBLICATIONS \hrulefill

20 peer-reviewed journal articles | 36 refereed conference proceedings | 3 manuscripts under review.

*Students mentored by Prof. A.L. Cunha are denoted by underlining*.

### Submitted Manuscripts

1. SALINAS, K., BARELLA, V., **CUNHA, A.L.**, [OLIVEIRA, G.M.]{.underline}, VIERA, T., NONATO, L.G. (2025) "ORDENA: ORigin-DEstiNAtion data exploration". *IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics* <[arXiv:2510.18278](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2510.18278)>

1. [LOURO, T. V.]{.underline}, GRIGOLON, A. B., **CUNHA, A. L.**, GEURS, K. T. (2025). "Cycling accessibility and equity: A systematic literature review". *Transport Reviews*.

1. [LOURO, T. V.]{.underline}, TOMASIELLO, D. B., GRIGOLON, A. B., **CUNHA, A. L.**, GEURS, K. T. (2026). "Integrating e-bikes and bikesharing with public transit: Evaluation of impacts on job accessibility and spatial equity". *Journal of Urban Mobility*.


### Peer-Reviewed Journal

1. [LOURO, T.V.]{.underline}; GRIGILON, A.B.; TIRACHINI, A.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; GEURS, K.T. (2026) "How Do E-Bikes Measure Up? Analyzing Speed Differences and Network Impacts of São Paulo’s Bikesharing System". *Transportation*. DOI: [10.1007/s11116-026-10724-y](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11116-026-10724-y)

1. [LOURO, T.V.]{.underline}; GRIGILON, A.B.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; GEURS, K.T. (2025) "E-bikes’ impact on job accessibility and equity in São Paulo and Rio". *Transportation Research Part D*. DOI: [10.1016/j.trd.2025.105072](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.trd.2025.105072)


1. [DE OLIVEIRA, G.J.M.]{.underline}; LAVIERI, P.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2023) Integrating a non-gridded space representation into a graph neural networks model for citywide short-term crash risk prediction. *Urban Informatics*. DOI: [10.1007/s44212-023-00032-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/s44212-023-00032-6)

1. FLEURY, M.P.; KAMAKURA, G.K.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; FERREIRA, F.B.; LINS DA SILVA, J. (2023) Assessing and Predicting Geogrid Reduction Factors after Damage Induced by Dropping Recycled Aggregates. *Sustainability*. DOI: [10.3390/su15139942](https://doi.org/10.3390/su15139942)


1. FLEURY, M.P.; KAMAKURA, G.K.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; LINS DA SILVA, J. (2023) Prediction of non-woven geotextiles’ reduction factors for damage caused by the drop of backfill materials. *Geotextiles and Geomembranes*. DOI: [10.1016/j.geotexmem.2023.05.004](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.geotexmem.2023.05.004)

1. SILVA, F.A.E.; BESSA JUNIOR, J.E.; COSTA, A.L.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; VELHO, D.M.C.; ANDALICIO, A. (2023) Exploratory analysis of the VISSIM simulation model for two-lane highways. *Engenharia Civil UM*. DOI: [10.21814/ecum.4493](https://doi.org/10.21814/ecum.4493)

1. SILVA, F.A.; BESSA JUNIOR, J.E.; COSTA, A.L.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; VELHO, D.M.C. (2022) Analysis of no-passing zones to assess the level of service on two-lane rural highways in Brazil. *Case Studies on Transport Policy*. DOI: [10.1016/j.cstp.2021.12.006](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cstp.2021.12.006)

1. [MORELLI, A. B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2021) Assessing vulnerabilities in transport networks: a graph-theoretic approach. *Transportes*. DOI: [10.14295/transportes.v29i1.2250](https://doi.org/10.14295/transportes.v29i1.2250)

1. SILVA, F.A.; BESSA JÚNIOR, J.E.; COSTA, A.L.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; ANDALÍCIO, A.F.; DA COSTA VELHO, D.M.; NAZARETH, V.S. (2021) Evaluation of the effect of climbing lanes on segments of two-lane highways. *Transportes*. DOI: [10.14295/transportes.v29i2.2359](https://doi.org/10.14295/transportes.v29i2.2359)

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2021) Measuring urban road network vulnerability to extreme events: An application for urban floods. *Transportation Research Part D*. DOI: [10.1016/j.trd.2021.102770](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.trd.2021.102770)

1. MARTINS, D.O.; [OLIVEIRA, G.J.M.]{.underline}; MORAES, F.R.; SILVA, I.; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2020) Geomatics data management system. *Revista Brasileira de Geomática*. DOI: [10.3895/rbgeo.v8n1.10141](https://doi.org/10.3895/rbgeo.v8n1.10141)

1. PIANUCCI, M.N.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; LIMA SEGANTINE, P.C. (2019) Forecasting household travel demand through a sequential method based on synthetic population and artificial neural networks. *Transportes*. DOI: [10.14295/transportes.v27i4.1409](https://doi.org/10.14295/transportes.v27i4.1409)

1. OLIVEIRA, J.V.M.; LAROCCA, A.P.C.; ARAUJO NETO, J.O.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; SANTOS, M.C.; SCHAAL, R.E. (2019) Rigid Bridges Health Dynamic Monitoring Using 100 Hz GPS Single-Frequency and Accelerometers. *Positioning*. DOI: [10.4236/pos.2019.102002](https://doi.org/10.4236/pos.2019.102002)

1. DE OLIVEIRA, J.V.M.; LAROCCA, A.P.C.; DE ARAÚJO NETO, J.O.; CUNHA, A.L.; DOS SANTOS, M.C.; SCHAAL, R.E. (2019) Vibration monitoring of a small concrete bridge using wavelet transforms on GPS data. *Journal Of Civil Structural Health Monitoring*. DOI: [10.1007/s13349-019-00341-y](https://doi.org/10.1007/s13349-019-00341-y)

1. LINDNER, A.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2017) Estimating motorized travel mode choice using classifiers: An application for high-dimensional multicollinear data. *Travel Behaviour and Society*. DOI: [10.1016/j.tbs.2016.08.003](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.tbs.2016.08.003)

1. SOUZA, N.C.; PITOMBO, C.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; LAROCCA, A.P.C.; DE ALMEIDA FILHO, G.S. (2017) Model for classification of linear erosion processes along railways through decision tree algorithm and geotechnologies. *Boletim de Ciências Geodésicas*. DOI: [10.1590/S1982-21702017000100005](https://doi.org/10.1590/S1982-21702017000100005)

1. ANDRADE, G.R.; PITOMBO, C.; **CUNHA, A.L.N.**; SETTI, J.R. (2016) A Model for Estimating Free-Flow Speed on Brazilian Expressways. *Transportation Research Procedia*. DOI: [10.1016/j.trpro.2016.06.032](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.trpro.2016.06.032)

1. LAROCCA, A.P.C.; ARAUJO NETO, J.O.; BARBOSA, A.C.B.; TRABANCO, J.L.A.; **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.** (2014) Dynamic Monitoring vertical Deflection of Small Concrete Bridge Using Conventional Sensors And 100 Hz GPS Receivers - Preliminary Results. *IOSRJEN Journal of Engineering*. DOI: [10.9790/3021-04920920](https://doi.org/10.9790/3021-04920920)


1. **CUNHA, A.L.**; SETTI, J.R. (2011) Truck equivalence factors for divided, multilane highways in Brazil. *Procedia: Social and Behavioral Sciences*. DOI: [10.1016/j.sbspro.2011.04.447](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.sbspro.2011.04.447)


### Selected Conference Proceedings (36 total: 10 most recent shown)

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; [ALIZON, G.B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2025) Alternative-Route Efficiency in Brazilian Cities: How Flood-Induced Collapse Patterns Differ from Random Blockages. In: XXXIX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2025, Goiânia. Proceedings of the 39th ANPET.

1. [LOURO, T.V.]{.underline}; ASSIS, L.B.M.; JUNIOR, J.U.P.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; GEURS, K.T (2025) Job Accessibility in the 15-Minute City: A Comparative Analysis of Walking, Cycling, and E-Bikes in Four Brazilian Cities. In: XXXIX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2025, Goiânia. Proceedings of the 39th ANPET.

1. ISHIHARA, B.A.; [QUINTINO, P.G.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.**; SETTI, J.R. (2025) Operation of Heavy Vehicles on Long, Steep Downgrades: Brake Thermal Simulation Based on ABNT NBR 10966-2. In: XXXIX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2025, Goiânia. Proceedings of the 39th ANPET.

1. RODRIGUES, L.R.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; LAROCCA, A.P.C.; FERRAZ, A.C.P. (2025) Identification of Crime and Traffic Crash Hotspots in the Vicinity of Bus Stops. In: XXXIX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2025, Goiânia. Proceedings of the 39th ANPET.

1. DAVOLI, J.P.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2025) Application of a Random-Forest–Based Variable Selection Method for the Analysis of Post-COVID-19 Active Transportation. In: XXXIX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2025, Goiânia. Proceedings of the 39th ANPET.

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2024) Vulnerability to flooding: how long-trip prevalence reduces the efficiency of alternative routes. In: XXXVIII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2024, Florianópolis. Proceedings of the 38th ANPET.

1. [MARCOMINI, L.A.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2023) Truck axle detection using Neural Networks: analysis of the number of images in the training dataset. In: ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2023, Santos. Proceedings of the 37th ANPET.

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; [LOURO, T.V.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2022) Proposal of bikeability indicators from an accessibility perspective: identifying roads best suited for cycle lanes using widely available data. In: XXXVI ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2022, Fortaleza. Proceedings of the XXXVI ANPET.

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2021) Pedestrian accessibility: impacts of morphological and demographic characteristics on access to facilities. In: XXXV ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2021. Proceedings of the XXXV ANPET.

<!--
1. OLIVATTO, T.F.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; MELANDA, E.A. (2020) Relationships between the nutritional status of preschoolers and socioeconomic and urban infrastructure indicators: a CART-based approach. In: PLURIS – Luso-Brazilian Congress on Urban, Regional, Integrated and Sustainable Planning, 2020. Proceedings of the 9th PLURIS.
--> 
1. [BOSCO JUNIOR, A.D.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2020) Street and zonal scale relationship between network centrality and economic activities: case study in Curitiba, Brazil. In: PLURIS – Luso-Brazilian Congress on Urban, Regional, Integrated and Sustainable Planning, 2020. Proceedings of the 9th PLURIS.

<!--
1. [VIZIOLI, H.T.]{.underline}; KUŠIC, K.; IVANJKO, E.; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2020) A method to calibrate Variable Speed Limit Control on high-truck-share roads: a case study in Brazil. In: Brazilian Technology Symposium - BTSym'20, 2020, Campinas. Smart Innovation, Systems and Technologies.

1. CAKIJA, D.; ASSIRATI, L.; IVANJKO, E.; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2019) Autonomous Intersection Management: A Short Review. In: 61st International Symposium ELMAR-2019, Zadar. Proceedings of the 61st ELMAR Symposium.

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2019) Identifying vulnerabilities in transport networks: a graph-theoretical approach. In: XXXIII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2019, Balneário Camboriú. Proceedings of the XXXIII ANPET.

1. [KURAMOTO, B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2019) Usability and limitations of collaborative map data in accessibility analysis. In: XXXIII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2019, Balneário Camboriú. Proceedings of the XXXIII ANPET.

1. SILVA, F.A.E.; BESSA JUNIOR, J.E.; COSTA, A.L.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; ANDALICIO, A.F.; VELHO, D.M.C.; NAZARETH, V.S. (2019) Evaluation of the effect of climbing lanes on single-lane highway segments. In: XXXIII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2019, Balneário Camboriú. Proceedings of the XXXIII ANPET.

1. [MARCOMINI, L.A.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2019) The impact of different video resolutions in a feature-based vehicle detection algorithm. In: XXXIII ANPET, 2019, Balneário Camboriú. Proceedings of XXXIII ANPET.

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2019) A strategy for assessing the impact of flooding on urban road systems. In: XXXIII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2019, Balneário Camboriú. Proceedings of the XXXIII ANPET.

1. [KURAMOTO, B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2018) Methodological proposal for construction and analysis of a real urban network. In: PLURIS – 8th Luso-Brazilian Congress on Urban, Regional, Integrated and Sustainable Planning, 2018, Coimbra. Proceedings of the 8th PLURIS.

1. [MORELLI, A.B.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2018) Methods for evaluating traffic conditions using Google Traffic and Twitter data. In: XXXII ANPET, 2018, Gramado, RS. Proceedings of XXXII ANPET.

1. [THEBIT, M.M.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2017) Comparison of traffic data available on the web and obtained by fixed sensors. In: XXXI ANPET, 2017, Recife. Proceedings of XXXI ANPET.

1. [RIBEIRO, E.R.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2017) Exploratory analysis of a method for anomaly detection in traffic data using Wavelet. In: XXXI ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2017, Recife. Proceedings of the XXXI ANPET.

1. [PANICE, N.R.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2017) Evaluation of a method for automatic truck axle detection in images. In: XXXI ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2017, Recife. Proceedings of the XXXI ANPET.

1. [OLIVEIRA, G.J.M.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2017) HCM calibration method for dual carriageways and expressways using Bayesian inference. In: XXXI ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2017, Recife. Proceedings of the XXXI ANPET.

1. ASSIS, R.K.M.; DURAN, J.B.C.; **CUNHA, A.L.**; PITOMBO, C.S.; FERNANDES JUNIOR, J.L. (2016) Application of Artificial Neural Networks for predictive modeling of pavement functional classification. In: PLURIS – Luso-Brazilian Congress on Urban, Regional, Integrated and Sustainable Planning, 2016, Maceió. Proceedings of the 7th PLURIS.

1. FERREIRA, F.A.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2016) Forecasting mode choice on a university campus using binomial logistic regression. In: PLURIS – Luso-Brazilian Congress on Urban, Regional, Integrated and Sustainable Planning, 2016, Maceió. Proceedings of the 7th PLURIS.

1. [THEBIT, M.M.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.**; PITOMBO, C.S. (2016) Relationship between bus mode supply and modal choice for airport access: a data mining approach. In: PLURIS – Luso-Brazilian Congress on Urban, Regional, Integrated and Sustainable Planning, 2016, Maceió. Proceedings of the 7th PLURIS.

1. [RIBEIRO, E.R.]{.underline}; **CUNHA, A.L.** (2016) Exploratory analysis of a method for defining a typical day using Wavelet transform and cluster analysis. In: XXX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2016, Rio de Janeiro, RJ. Proceedings of the XXX ANPET.

1. ANDRADE, G.R.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; SETTI, J.R.; FERRAZ, A.C.P. (2015) Forecasting free-flow speed on São Paulo expressways and highways. In: 9th Brazilian Congress of Highways and Concessions – CBR&C, 2015, Brasília. Proceedings of the 9th CBR&C.

1. ROCHA, S.S.; PIANUCCI, M.N.; PITOMBO, C.S.; **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.** (2015) Use of Neural Networks for trip production forecasting: an aggregate analysis. In: XXIX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2015, Ouro Preto, MG. Proceedings of the XXIX ANPET.

1. **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; SETTI, J.R.; GONZAGA, A. (2013) Comparison of background generation models in vehicular traffic video processing. In: XXVII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2013, Belém. Proceedings of the XXVII ANPET.

1. BESSA JUNIOR, J.E.; **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; SETTI, J.R. (2011) Comparison between CORSIM and TWOPAS simulators for modeling two-lane highways. In: XXV ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2011, Rio de Janeiro, RJ. National Overview of Transport Research 2011, p.2140–2151.

1. **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; SETTI, J.R. (2009) Equivalence factors for trucks on dual carriageway highways. In: 6th Brazilian Congress of Highways and Concessions – CBR&C, 2009, Florianópolis, SC. Proceedings of the 6th CBR&C.

1. **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; MODOTTI, M.M.; SETTI, J.R. (2008) Truck classification through cluster analysis. In: XXII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2008, Fortaleza, CE. Proceedings of the XXII ANPET.

1. BESSA JUNIOR, J.E.; LIMA, F.A.A.; **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; SETTI, J.R. (2008) Calibration of the Integration simulator’s performance model using a genetic algorithm. In: XXII ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2008, Fortaleza, CE. Proceedings of the XXII ANPET.

1. **CUNHA, A.L.B.N.**; SETTI, J.R. (2006) Calibration of the CORSIM truck performance model using a genetic algorithm. In: XX ANPET – Research and Teaching in Transport Congress, 2006, Brasília. Proceedings of the XX ANPET, v.I, p.88–99.


-->



## TECHNICAL PROFICIENCY & COMPUTATIONAL STACK \hrulefill

- **Traffic Simulation:** PTV Vissim, AIMSUN, SUMO, MATSim, TSIS-CORSIM (expert: calibration, validation, API scripting)
- **AI & Data Science:** PyTorch, TensorFlow, OpenCV, Graph Neural Networks, deep learning pipelines
- **Programming:** Python, R, C++, Julia, SQL, MATLAB, HTML/CSS
- **Engineering & GIS:** AutoCAD, Civil 3D, QGIS
- **E-Learning:** Moodle, Google Classroom, blended/online course design, inverted classroom methodology



## AWARDS & HONORS \hrulefill

- **ANPET Scientific Production Award** (2023) — National Agency for Transport Research & Education
- **Best Professor, Transport Engineering** (2016, 2017) — USP Civil Engineering Academic Secretariat
- **ABCR Innovation Salon Award** (2015) — 9th Brazilian Congress on Highways & Concessions

## PROFESSIONAL SERVICES \hrulefill

### University of São Paulo

- Elected member, Department Council — faculty hiring, budget, strategic partnerships
- Member, Graduate Program Coordinating Committee (CCP-ET) — admissions, curriculum, scholarships
- Member, Research and Innovation Committee (CPqI) — interdisciplinary grants, industry collaboration
- Board member, Center for Educational Technology (CETEPE) — e-learning strategy
- Member, Culture & Extension Committee (CCEx) — pedagogical modernisation

### Editorial & Peer Review

- Reviewer: *Transportation Research Part E*, *Engineering Applications of AI (EAAI)*, *Sustainable Cities and Society*
- Technical Committees: Transportation Research Board (TRB), IEEE ITSS, ANPET

### Industry Engagement

- CCR Group & ARTERIS — national safety standards for truck escape ramps on Brazilian federal highways
- TECTRAN — Minas Gerais State Logistics Plan (PELT)
- Media: research featured on Rede Globo's *Jornal Hoje* (national broadcast)
